item.text: I found a very small surface: [`/tmp/nix-shell-1737626-0/clasp-contract-suite-lead-digest-upgrade-raw-repo-raw-text-GCWvLS/Main.clasp`](/tmp/nix-shell-1737626-0/clasp-contract-suite-lead-digest-upgrade-raw-repo-raw-text-GCWvLS/Main.clasp) and [`/tmp/nix-shell-1737626-0/clasp-contract-suite-lead-digest-upgrade-raw-repo-raw-text-GCWvLS/Shared/Lead.clasp`](/tmp/nix-shell-1737626-0/clasp-contract-suite-lead-digest-upgrade-raw-repo-raw-text-GCWvLS/Shared/Lead.clasp). item.text:
Upgraded the lead follow-up contract to `LeadDigest` and propagated it through the active flow.

[`Shared/Lead.clasp`](/tmp/nix-shell-1737626-0/clasp-contract-suite-lead-digest-upgrade-raw-repo-raw-text-GCWvLS/Shared/Lead.clasp) now defines `LeadDigest` with `company`, `priorityLabel`, `owner`, and `needsFollowUp`, updates `LeadPlaybookLookup` to carry `owner` and `needsFollowUp`, and stores `digest : LeadDigest` in workflow state. [`Main.clasp`](/tmp/nix-shell-1737626-0/clasp-contract-suite-lead-digest-upgrade-raw-repo-raw-text-GCWvLS/Main.clasp) now returns `LeadDigest` from the summary route, builds the downstream lookup request from that digest, and keeps `main` evaluating to `"senior-ae"` for a high-priority lead.

Verification passed with `bash scripts/verify.sh`.
